records.title: Append-only event recorder
records.admission_rationale: The instance appends externally supplied records and replays them in order without interpreting, evaluating, or deriving conclusions.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Append and replay only; event sourcing projections and policy engines are excluded.

candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Events are opaque payloads with timestamps.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: Order is preserved but does not support inference.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No alternatives are evaluated; all valid external inputs are appended.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: No uncertainty or revision; correction requires a new external event.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The sequence may be used by an external reasoner, but the recorder itself performs no reasoning.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No alternatives are evaluated; all valid external inputs are appended.

records.title: Fixed approval workflow
records.admission_rationale: The instance follows a predeclared routing table from submission to approval or rejection without comparing reasons or revising rules.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Deterministic workflow routing; human review content and policy interpretation are external.

transitions_and_constraints: transition selected solely by external approval bit
candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: States are workflow labels and the external bit is authoritative.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: The route records sequence but does not derive the approval input.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Route a request through fixed stages.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Branches exist operationally, but the system does not evaluate which branch is justified.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: Operational branching alone is not treated as reasoning.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Branches exist operationally, but the system does not evaluate which branch is justified.

records.title: Arbitrary labeled transition toggler
records.admission_rationale: The instance moves between labeled states according to an arbitrary transition relation with no semantic interpretation or task.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: One finite deterministic labeled transition system; any external interpretation is excluded.

candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: Path history can be recorded but does not constrain meaning.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No outcome is preferred or justified.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The record tests whether generic transition structure alone discriminates reasoning.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No outcome is preferred or justified.
